languages.text: {n}Себериан поворачивает к вам голову, и его импланты отзываются металлическим скрежетом.{/n} "Что насчет вас? Вы же не станете советовать мне запереться за воротами и ждать, пока враг сам явится на расправу?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Себериан поворачивает к вам голову, и его импланты отзываются металлическим скрежетом.{/n} "Что насчет вас? Вы же не станете советовать мне запереться за воротами и ждать, пока враг сам явится на расправу?"

languages.text: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан поворачивает к вам голову, и его импланты отзываются металлическим скрежетом.{/n} "Что насчет вас? Вы же не станете советовать мне запереться за воротами и ждать, пока враг сам явится на расправу?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to come to his own slaughter?"

{n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"

{n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"

{n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to come to his own slaughter?"

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安转头看向你，植入物发出金属摩擦声。{/n}“那么你呢？你总不会建议我们把自己关在城门之后，静候敌人前来送死吧？”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安转头看向你，植入物发出金属摩擦声。{/n}“那么你呢？你总不会建议我们把自己关在城门之后，静候敌人前来送死吧？”

languages.text: {n}Seberian tourne la tête vers vous, et ses implants métalliques réagissent en grinçant.{/n} « Et vous, alors ? Êtes-vous aussi d'avis que nous devons nous enfermer derrière ces portes et attendre que l'ennemi vienne se faire massacrer ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian tourne la tête vers vous, et ses implants métalliques réagissent en grinçant.{/n} « Et vous, alors ? Êtes-vous aussi d'avis que nous devons nous enfermer derrière ces portes et attendre que l'ennemi vienne se faire massacrer ? »

languages.text: {n}Seberian gira su cabeza metálica hacia ti con un chirrido metálico de sus implantes.{/n} «¿Y qué hay de usted? Espero que tenga algún consejo que no sea encerrarnos tras las puertas y esperar a que el enemigo se presente para que lo masacremos».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian gira su cabeza metálica hacia ti con un chirrido metálico de sus implantes.{/n} «¿Y qué hay de usted? Espero que tenga algún consejo que no sea encerrarnos tras las puertas y esperar a que el enemigo se presente para que lo masacremos».

languages.text: {n}Seberian, başını sana doğru çeviriyor. İmplantları metalik bir gıcırtıyla tepki veriyor.{/n} "Peki ya sen? Kendimizi kapıların arkasına kilitleyip düşmanın bizi katletmesini beklemekten yana olamazsın."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, başını sana doğru çeviriyor. İmplantları metalik bir gıcırtıyla tepki veriyor.{/n} "Peki ya sen? Kendimizi kapıların arkasına kilitleyip düşmanın bizi katletmesini beklemekten yana olamazsın."

languages.text: {n}Als Seberian seinen Kopf in deine Richtung dreht, reagieren seine Implantate mit einem metallischen Knirschen.{/n} "Was ist mit Euch? Ihr ratet uns doch sicher nicht, dass wir uns hinter den Toren einsperren und warten, bis der Feind kommt, um sich abschlachten zu lasen?"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Als Seberian seinen Kopf in deine Richtung dreht, reagieren seine Implantate mit einem metallischen Knirschen.{/n} "Was ist mit Euch? Ihr ratet uns doch sicher nicht, dass wir uns hinter den Toren einsperren und warten, bis der Feind kommt, um sich abschlachten zu lasen?"

languages.text:
{n}セベリアンは顔を向け、金属的な歯ごたえと共にインプラントが反応する。{/n}
「君はどう思う？ 敵が自らの首を差し出して屠られるのを待つために、城の門を閉ざして待っているべきだとアドバイスするつもりはないだろう？」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"

traits.locale_text:
{n}セベリアンは顔を向け、金属的な歯ごたえと共にインプラントが反応する。{/n}
「君はどう思う？ 敵が自らの首を差し出して屠られるのを待つために、城の門を閉ざして待っているべきだとアドバイスするつもりはないだろう？」
